g.text: Swap, move, crop, get info, export panels.
Comments, arrange, batch crop/export, case convert.
Center guides, delete empty/hidden layers, rename sort.
Top, bottom, left, right, border, clear all.
Snap layer edges to nearest guide. Match size.
Edge & center distribution with custom spacing.
Move to selection, arrange in grid, swap layers.
Rotate, flip, and auto-rotate to fit selection.
Batch rename with templates, find & replace.
Add sequential panel labels (A, B, C…) to figures.
Draw width/height markers with auto-calculated size.
